title: Backend Python Engineer
responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a middle backend python engineer to support developing backend services, APIs, and data-driven platform features.
raw_text: Vacancy V025: Backend Python Engineer at NovaSoft. Location: Odesa. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 2.9 years. Required skills: python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker, pytest, flask, kubernetes, aws. Optional skills: terraform, prometheus, microservices. Responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring.
